name: woodland
description: Secure HTTP framework for Node.js. Express-compatible with built-in security, no performance tradeoff.
author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>

scripts.benchmark: npm install express fastify --no-save && node benchmark.js
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=tests/** --test-reporter=spec tests/**/*.test.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt && ! grep -q "failing tests" coverage.txt
scripts.fix: oxlint --fix *.js benchmarks src tests && oxfmt *.js benchmarks src tests/unit --write
scripts.lint: oxlint *.js benchmarks src tests && oxfmt *.js benchmarks src tests/unit --check
